features.name: sequential bit-slice assignment from randomized value
features.description: Code should include sequential bit-slice assignments from a single $random or $urandom source to multiple registers

features.name: unused register with sequential randomization
features.description: Code should include a register that is written but never read, used alongside registers that are read

features.name: urandom_deprecated_system_function
features.description: Code should include the deprecated $urandom system function for generating random values
